name: property managers overseeing 5–15 commercial buildings tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–15 commercial buildings, high energy costs cause budget overruns. We provide actionable insights and cost-saving recommendations instead of manual energy audits and utility bills analysis.
problem_solved: High energy costs and inefficient usage across multiple properties.
